commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a configurable cron ghost-run warning for fast main-session `next-heartbeat` `systemEvent` handoffs, persists warnings in run logs, extends gateway/Swift/UI run-history surfaces, documents the setting, and currently edits CHANGELOG.md.

PR surface: Source +88, Tests +162, Docs +13, Other +4. Total +267 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main's main-session cron path can enqueue a `next-heartbeat` system event and return `ok` without proving agent processing completed. I did not run a live gateway-down reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The source-compatibility and changelog blockers are narrow mechanical repairs; threshold policy still needs maintainer acceptance after the branch is build-clean.

target.title: fix(cron): warn on main heartbeat handoff ghost runs
target.body:
Fixes #63106.

## Summary

- Add a scoped warning for fast successful main-session `systemEvent` cron jobs using `wakeMode="next-heartbeat"`.
- Persist the `possible-main-next-heartbeat-ghost-run` annotation in cron run logs.
- Carry and render cron run-log warnings in the Control UI run history.
- Add `cron.ghostRunWarningThresholdMs` config with schema/help metadata and public docs.
- Keep release-note context in the PR body only; this branch does not edit `CHANGELOG.md`.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Verified that a fast successful main-session `systemEvent` cron handoff using `wakeMode: "next-heartbeat"` writes the `possible-main-next-heartbeat-ghost-run` warning into the cron run log, and that Control UI run history can render that warning from `CronRunLogEntry.warnings`.
- **Real environment tested:** Local macOS checkout on current PR head `55b75e7d30fecb4af5753349f33454c20959357c`, using the real `buildGatewayCronService`, real cron run-log reader, and Control UI cron run-history renderer. The cron proof used an isolated temporary `OPENCLAW_HOME` and did not touch the real user cron store.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Rebased onto current `upstream/main`, ran focused cron/gateway and Control UI tests, verified formatting/whitespace, and rechecked the isolated cron run-log proof path from the PR body. The Control UI follow-through is covered by a focused render test that passes a run entry with `warnings: ["possible-main-next-heartbeat-ghost-run"]` and asserts the warning chip appears in the run-history row.
- **Evidence after fix:** Current-head focused test output:

```console
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/cron.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/cron.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/antonio/projects/openclaw_worktrees/pr72677_clean

 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  50 passed (50)
   Start at  16:30:13
   Duration  1.39s (transform 360ms, setup 66ms, import 408ms, tests 252ms, environment 546ms)
```

```console
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/cron-protocol-conformance.test.ts src/gateway/server-cron.test.ts src/cron/run-log.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/antonio/projects/openclaw_worktrees/pr72677_clean

 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  42 passed (42)
   Start at  16:31:49
   Duration  3.86s (transform 1.58s, setup 188ms, import 3.35s, tests 152ms, environment 0ms)
```

Current-head isolated run-log proof shape, redacted from the real gateway cron service/run-log path:

```json
{
  "home": "/tmp/openclaw-ghost-proof.redacted",
  "jobId": "redacted-job-id",
  "logPath": "/tmp/openclaw-ghost-proof.redacted/runs/redacted-job-id.jsonl",
  "latest": {
    "action": "finished",
    "status": "ok",
    "summary": "proof handoff",
    "runId": "cron:redacted-job-id:redacted-start-ms",
    "durationMs": 7,
    "deliveryStatus": "not-requested",
    "warnings": [
      "possible-main-next-heartbeat-ghost-run"
    ]
  }
}
```

Format and whitespace checks:

```console
$ ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/cli/cron.md docs/gateway/configuration-reference.md src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/types.cron.ts src/config/zod-schema.ts src/cron/cron-protocol-conformance.test.ts src/cron/run-log.ts src/gateway/protocol/schema/cron.ts src/gateway/server-cron.test.ts src/gateway/server-cron.ts ui/src/ui/types.ts ui/src/ui/views/cron.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/cron.ts
Checking formatting...
All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 398ms on 14 files using 1 threads.

$ git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD
(no output)
```

- **Observed result after fix:** The forced main-session `next-heartbeat` handoff completed successfully, the persisted run-log entry contains `warnings: ["possible-main-next-heartbeat-ghost-run"]`, and Control UI run history renders that warning as a warning chip.
- **What was not tested:** I did not dispatch a real scheduled agent turn from the user's production cron store; the warning proof used an isolated temporary OpenClaw home with the real gateway cron service and run-log modules so it would not affect real scheduled jobs.

## Tests

- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/cron.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/cron.test.ts`
- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/cron-protocol-conformance.test.ts src/gateway/server-cron.test.ts src/cron/run-log.test.ts`
- [x] `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/cli/cron.md docs/gateway/configuration-reference.md src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/types.cron.ts src/config/zod-schema.ts src/cron/cron-protocol-conformance.test.ts src/cron/run-log.ts src/gateway/protocol/schema/cron.ts src/gateway/server-cron.test.ts src/gateway/server-cron.ts ui/src/ui/types.ts ui/src/ui/views/cron.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/cron.ts`
- [x] `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
target.author: liaoandi
